title: Charred Canadian Quesadilla
description: A twist on the classic quesadilla, featuring charred Canadian cheese.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the cumin and stir for 1 minute.
Place the tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle the charred Canadian cheese on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the cheese.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Cut the quesadilla into wedges and serve hot.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
